name: I C Bus LLC
carrier_operation: not a motor carrier (school bus MANUFACTURER, Navistar subsidiary)
inc_date: 1933 (predecessor Ward Body Works); renamed IC Corporation 2001; IC Bus LLC as Navistar subsidiary
entity_status: manufacturing facility closed Jan 2010; Conway site sold to DBG (Canadian metal products supplier) in 2017
registry_source: Encyclopedia of Arkansas; Wikipedia; D&B; Arkansas SOS (no direct hit retrieved)
notes: MISCLASSIFIED for tuck-in pipeline. I C Bus LLC at 751 S Harkrider Conway AR is the IC Bus/Ward Body Works school bus manufacturing legacy site, NOT a student transportation operator. SAFER keyword search for 'I C BUS LLC' returned zero carriers. Conway assembly plant closed January 2010 (production moved to Tulsa OK); Conway parts ops acquired by DBG in 2017. Recommend removing from buyer universe.

name: Harlow's Bus Svc
fmcsa_address: 1021 S 23RD STREET SUITE A, BISMARCK, ND 58504 (corporate HQ); Kalispell MT branch at 1939 1/2 MT Hwy 35
inc_date: 1985-12-23 (MT foreign corp filing F017695); parent founded 1973
registry_source: Montana Secretary of State (entity F017695) via OpenCorporates/b2bhint; FMCSA SAFER
notes: Match is Harlow's School Bus Service Inc OF MONTANA (USDOT 703193) for the Kalispell MT operation. There is also a separate parent entity 'HARLOW'S BUS SERVICE INC' (USDOT 321336, 12 power units, MC-162811) at the same Bismarck ND HQ, but that is the truck/bus sales arm. Student transport operations are USDOT 703193. Privately owned multi-state operator across ND, SD, MT, ID, WA. Good tuck-in candidate.

name: Hamburg School Car Svc
carrier_operation: unknown (likely intrastate-only school bus / car service)
officers: Joan Jarvis (former operator per Buffalo News)
entity_status: likely inactive/dissolved at primary Hamburg NY location
registry_source: Buffalo News real estate report; Yelp; Chamber of Commerce listing; SAFER keyword search returned zero matches
notes: SAFER keyword searches for 'HAMBURG SCHOOL' and 'HAMBURG SCHOOL CAR' both returned zero carriers - this operator is not (or no longer) USDOT-registered. Public records show the actual business location was 3080 Amsdell Rd, Hamburg NY 14075 (NOT the input address 27 Wilma Dr Lancaster NY). Joan Jarvis sold the 13,914 sq ft single-story Hamburg building to McAllister Plumbing & Heating for $900,000, suggesting the bus business was wound down. Input address 27 Wilma Dr Lancaster NY 14086 not corroborated by independent sources; possible data quality issue in source list. Likely defunct - low fit for tuck-in.

notes: MISCLASSIFIED for tuck-in pipeline. SAFER 'NORTHLAND TRANSPORTATION INC' results (USDOTs 204050 Laurel NE, 881401 Prior Lake MN, 2214005 Jackson MI) are different entities, NOT the Schenectady NY business. The Schenectady operator is a luxury sedan/chauffeur/corporate car service based in Glenville/Scotia NY (54 Freemans Bridge Rd) serving 'Tech Valley' Capital District (NY/MA/VT) since 1986, NOT a school bus contractor. Likely intrastate-only (no USDOT required). Not a fit for Summit's student transportation tuck-in strategy.
